args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: Three orders affected by the duplicate-charge batch fault have been refunded and customers notified. Total refunded: $79.96 (ORD-5501 $19.99, ORD-5502 $19.99, ORD-5503 $39.98). Root cause (disabled double_charge_guard) fixed and billing-api redeployed at v3.4.1. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
